title: Anupama Parameshwaran, Attorney - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## Anupama Parameshwaran, Attorney
Anupama Parameshwaran is an attorney at the Murthy Law Firm, the nation’s leading immigration law practice. With over 17 years of legal immigration experience, Anupama has built a reputation for client focused solutions in complex nonimmigrant visa options – including H1B, L-1, R-1, E-2, E-3, and TN for both IT and non-IT companies. Anupama has expertise in responding to RFE, NOID/NOIR, and 221G matters. She represents small and medium-sized business as well as individual clients throughout Maryland, the United States, and across the globe.
Anupama practiced immigration law in Atlanta, GA, as an in-house immigration counsel for an information technology company focusing on H1B and Perm applications. Prior to joining Murthy Law Firm, Anupama worked as a contract attorney in Atlanta, GA, handling family-based immigration and naturalization cases.

## Types of Cases Worked on by Attorney Anupama Parameshwaran
Overcoming H1B Specialty Occupation Requests for Evidence
Filing a Nunc Pro Tunc Request to Reinstate Status in the U.S.
Overview of L1A New Office Petitions for Managers and Executives
TN Status: Employment Option for Canadian and Mexican Citizens

## Education & Admissions
- Bachelor of Laws, University of Madras, India
- Master of Laws, University of Georgia at Athens
- Admitted to the New York State Bar Association
